title: thymus glabrescens subsp. degenianus
intro: Thymus glabrescens subsp. degenianus, also known as Degen's thyme, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is a type of perennial herb that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thymus glabrescens subsp. degenianus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antifungal and antibacterial properties. This plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support respiratory health.
